title: Predictive Payout Reconciliation
requirements: Automated calculation of stakeholder shares based on 'Sovereignty Equity'.
Support for regional payout methods (EGP/SAR/USD bank transfers).
Real-time settlement reporting for the Omega dashboard.
Compliance: Adherence to Law 151 data residency for payout metadata.

logic.execution: Invoke regional payout adapters (Stripe Connect / Regional APIs).
logic.logging: Record all financial movements in the immutable 'Factory-Ledger'.
